reviews.review_title: The game is goo its just the players
reviews.review_description: The game itself is good but the players are the problem they i was in a server and i saw the owner didnt tell me any rules did nothing wrong he kills me so i kill him backthe point of the game but then he bans me for it and for the kids or adults that want it to be just them are pretty dumb they make the server public not private then they resort to banning people they dont want in the server. So the game is good its just the players that are the problem.

developer_response.body: Yeah players can be an issue, it sounds like you got unlucky and ran into some toxic ones including a lobby host who banned you from his lobby for no reason. Player behavior can be a tricky thing to solve. While we're working on solutions - if anyone has suggestions to reduce toxicity from the players, message me at simulatedmindsinc@gmail.com or kami822 on Discord.

reviews.review_description: The game is very good, the dev team is very interactive with their community and that’s really good because that’s something a lot of games don’t do these days, they aren’t greedy like tactic￼al assault vr devs with 4 DLCs, and the gameplay is really good in the game feels very well developed ￼

reviews.review_title: they should add a abandoned city
reviews.review_description: they should add abandoned city with zombies and you have to find like resources like for like guns and how you got there with your plain  crashed and now you're stuck in the abandoned city until you fina radio and you fix it then you can call for supplies to fix your c 130 and then escape

Despite I had a good review already I decided to write another one after playing more of it. 

This game is just plain stupid fun in a good way! 

Devs some ideas-

Add a strategic point system that prevents the game getting out of balance. 

Add a way we can select a unit or a single piece and give order. This would make the game perfect! 

5 stars because I’m having so much fun with it.

I’ve had this game for about two years now and I still have a genuinely good time playing it. Only two things I can think of that need some attention. The ability to dig and a tree prop. For digging it doesn’t have to be something major or anything just an E-tool would work great. And for trees I don’t really care. It would definitely make some maps look a little cooler as a prop not a background. Still think it is definitely worth the fifteen dollars though. All in all, 4 4/6 stars. (There isn’t a star option for fractions so I just put it at five).

reviews.review_title: How could I not love this game
reviews.review_description: Being 100% honest this is literally one of the best games I have ever played in my entire life hardly any glitches I mean right now in this moment, I can’t really think of any glitches that I have noticed I couldn’t even tell you how excited I am for all the updates. I am genuinely obsessed with this game it’s such a good game I love how I can build my own servers and ￼ build whatever I want I even built a wild West server. I just don’t understand why I wouldn’t give this a five star review best game ever.￼￼￼

I love this game this is the closest I will get to ever being a real ww2 soldier and I admire the work for all devs.I remember being 4 and I got toy soldiers for my birthday and I was addicted.I really would like more ww2 weapons and Maybe some ww1 weapons.But off point I recommend this game to any one who is looking for a a good shooter heck even a roleplay game if you want there’s so much you can do and it’s a sandbox game so if you don’t like any of the base game maps you can build your own.The developers must be wizards because this is what vr stand for.

The entire game is absolutely amazing. There are very few bugs and at the moment I am only having trouble with 1. It could use a few more things but the updates just keep coming and it is absolutely amazing. One thing that would make this my favorite game is if they added battleships and make planes and helicopters enterable. The only flyable thing is a drone. The online play could also use some work. There are also a lot of collision issues to the point that I am climbing on air kinda far away from what I should be climbing on. 

Just keep the updates coming and this game will be amazing! I would not doubt buying this.

Physics are super amazing nice community super fun fights and SO MANY WEAPONS the developers are super nice. They’re gun models are super nice too. They’re very cool. I think this game is 10 out of 10. You should get it. It is very very good. I’ve had this game for seven months now and game is amazing. get it now it’s very good.

reviews.review_title: Great game have some ideas for it though
reviews.review_description: Great game! Love it however it feels a little boring sometimes. I feel like one thing that could improve the game is the ability to ride helicopters and tanks with out driving them. Also some new types of weapons that use backpacks like the flame thrower. You would like spawn in the weapon and it would spawn in its backpack too and you would put on the backpack that would take up both back slots. You could also add backpack fed machine guns and another thing too add would be a team reload so in multiplayer you could have your friend reload you’re bazoka and then you could just fire it again  which would make reloading faster

Hello creators of Plastic battlegrounds, I had an issue with

1 spawning flashlights

2 Voice chat in multiplayer

I cannot spawn flashlights it is a recurring issue

And I went into multiplayer to have a fun paratrooper attack but I could not hear anyone and they cannot hear me. I could not communicate my plan for our battle to attack a German air base through paratroopers and a player lead tank squad

Just like military military army it’s very fun if you like shooting, but not inappropriate so it’s very cool for kids and like people who like toy soldiers like when I was a kid I love the toy soldiers. It’s the best thing I toy I wanna play with and this game just makes me cheer up.

Overall, it is amazing. But the servers in multiplayer lag and crash very often. Also( sorry if this is already in teh game) I would like if you added a feature, that if you make a cool map, you can submit it, and people can use the map.

Such a Super fun Army men simulator game! And For the Devs, I know you guys have ww1 German Soldiers in the game but do you think you can make some ww2 German soldiers as well. That use the mp40 and other ww2 weapons. And Maybe in a future update you could add some more car props or maybe a level with a toy train that actually moves that would be cool! Its a really fun game if you like gun games and chaotic shootouts and skill. Though it does get really laggy sometimes but its avoidable most of the time.

*SPOILERS SPOILERS*Next to all that arm movement slop Is this game wich Has you become a plastic soldier you can choose between the blue team the green team the tan team and the grey team And there's Many weapons like MANY and some are insanely fun to use *cough cough* Riot shield+Minigun*cough cough* and There's Tons of props To build and save your own maps some of my examples are an enterable paratrooper plane with turrets,engines,Details like a fuel tank,Ball turret,Chairs for the crew,Pilot bay,Bombing bay,Storage room But Know you can't build working drivable vehicles yet but you can make them eneterble and freeze them in the air and make its weapons work and there's a good variety of vehicles for example,AA gun,Tank(player tank included, Helicopters and Ospreys(not enterable) Twingun tanks(Enterable) And An NPC helicopter who can drop npcs off and the devs are Working on Humvees right now And there's many units like gas mask units and Sniper units and Pickelhaube units and the variety of maps is really good with a beach raid And Household rooms and Trenches and straight up Vietnam in a greenhouse and the threshold with an Easter egg where Out of bounds is a text saying about "How did you go here you should be a tester!" Wich leads us to the next thing Testers wich are people who get Updates early and report bugs in updates to get them fixed and the player can spawn Airstrikes like B17 or F4 Phantoms so overall great game.

Thank you for making this game and i hope you have a good rest of your life!

This game is my absolute favorite on VR. From the maps to the secrets I love everything about this game. Although I do have some recommendations to possibly add in the game. I would love to see NPC’S be able to heal you if you die and I would love a skipable timer right after you die so they have time to heal you.  Also be a big mode map where it would be like a nerf battle or something in MP. Lastly, I would really like a campaign mode where you’re a soldier and not in big mode.

reviews.review_title: Best Cheap FPS VR game in a long time.
reviews.review_description: This game is truly one of the greatest out there. Very underrated in my opinion and should honestly be more popular. It seeks funny, energetic, and serious gameplay along with an abundance of troops, weapons and props, all very well made. There are many things that make it one of my favorites. Being able to create your own custom levels and fight the tans in an interactive, intense battle. Although sometimes it can be a little laggy I won’t turn you away from buying it. The updates are always packed, fruitful, and never get tiring. This is a Guarantee buy for a new or veteran VR player, especially because the player base is always such great people. I also would like to see some more finer details like the G79 snaping in half to reload it instead down the barrel, or maybe more different types of shotguns like the benelli m4, AA-12, spas-12, or the Winchester model 1887 t2. Overall great game and hope some of that stuff gets added. 5 stars. Devs, keep cooking!

I purchased Plastic Battlegrounds because it looked cool and has good reviews. After downloading the game stays on a black loading screen Forever!  I want a refund. Games and developers like this will ruin the platforms they are marketed on so now you don’t know what games that will work.

developer_response.body: Hey I'm the maker of PBG, I just saw this. The way you fix it is by reinstalling it. Sometimes the headset installs the game incorrectly, you just got to reinstall. Hope it helps.

reviews.review_title: Idk how the ratings are so good
reviews.review_description: I bought this on my quest 2 about half a year ago and refunded it because it ran really bad, and the tracking was bad, so I got a quest 3, and i bought it again, hoping that it would run better which it does slightly but not by much and the aiming/tracking is so janky and horrible I dont think ill ever touch it again unless it had a massive tracking/aiming overhaul. Genuinely the only game on my quest2/3 ive ever had issues with performance wise or tracking/aiming wise . I love the concept and maps and even the voicelines just not the actual game

when i was a little kid i loved to play with my plastic soldiers. But the soldiers never moved to fight each other. But this game makes those dreams come true! You fight with your guys, drop down units and most of all its just really fun!!!! So if you always loved to play with plastic soldiers this game is for you!

Back then, I love to play toy soldiers and I would always come up with the best storylines. Ever since I heard there was a vr game about my childhood toys i was so happy and bought it immediately! It definitely lived up to my expectations with its sandbox style and action packed gameplay. I found it fun to fly around as a human, and even more fun to shoot enemy teams as a toy! So if you love fun sandbox games and those green toy soldiers then this game is for you! 5 stars! would recommend!

reviews.review_title: Buy this if vr is getting boring.
reviews.review_description: If vr is getting boring and you want a military sandbox game. Get this I have no idea what I would do without this game! This game is a cure to boredom. To the devs making this awesome game, I just want to thank you for the awsome game! Indie devs are the best.
It was so good I like it so much  if you are looking for a game this .is the game best for you.
best game on vr

developer_response.body: You can't be banned from all multiplayer lobbies since there isn't a system to do that, you can only be banned from the server host's lobby. Message me who this admin via simulatedmindsinc@gmail.com, we'd like to cut down on toxicity, thanks.

reviews.review_description: As much as I like playing plastic battlegrounds I hate the spawning system in multiplayer.When I was in a map that took me 5 days to build I decide to show it in multiplayer to people but then someone blocked off a building entrance and I don’t know how to fix and and the same person spawn a bunch of those had cylinder tents in the lobby making me leave the game as much as I like this game TURN OFF SPAWNING IN THE LOBBY.

This is already such a good game, I’m sorry this is such a short review but just know I’m not a planted ai bot trying to get people to buy it. If you don’t like the people in the servers then make a private server! Don’t make your own he//!
It is great 😊

reviews.review_title: Great game would recommend to a friend.
reviews.review_description: Plastic battlegrounds is an overall great game it can be a bit buggy at some points. In my experience, it is  buggy, but it's because I spammed green troops for a battle against the tans. It's good if you wish to sim battles or blow up tanks, or you could do both. You can drive but can't fly yet i know its in progress so hopefully it come out within the next 3ish months the jeep is a bit hard to control but I don't know if that's a user error. It's really fun for me zipping around the maps looking for secret weapons,  but sometimes the grapple gun just flies out of my hand I'm  still not sure if it's a user error, though. Now, for my last error that is mildly irritating is I wish there was a way to sprint, maybe by pumping your arms, still a overall great game, 4 stars
The best game ever it is so relaxing and loving how much you can create

reviews.review_title: It’s a really nice sandbox game
reviews.review_description: I got this game from a TikTok and it looked pretty fun I then got the game and this is the best game I’ve gotten. I love spawning units and becoming one. The weapons are really cool and the gameplay is really fun I love making maps and saves of my own with the props I’ve spawned. My rating for this game is 9.3 out of ten

When I first got this game I was like this game sucks but since the devs are doing banger after banger I’m getting back into it and this game started my shooting vr game career so credit to plastic battlegrounds

never been boring
This game is so fun I made over 20+ maps I love this game

I thought I was going to buy this,and have a little fun but little did I know, that experiencing the horrors of war as a toy is one of the greatest experiences I’ve ever had, and this makes me want to buy toy soldiers in real life, and thank you for making your game cheap, and amazing thank you devs.

The game is very good and good for 9.99$ and it's worth it tho the downside is the toxicity in the game because people normally come in a server and scream the n word and then leave but still I will play this game all the time
Will become a beta tester can’t wait for the game to get multiplayer and I’m also subscribe to the channel official plastic battlegrounds channel￼

reviews.review_title: Just like being a kid again!
reviews.review_description: Plastic Battlegrounds is exactly what I dreamed of when I was playing with toy soldiers on my bedroom floor. The sense of scale is incredible—switching from the 'God view' to being right in the middle of the crossfire as a tiny soldier is a game-changer. The physics are super fun, and seeing a tank blast through a pile of blocks never gets old. It’s a sandbox with endless possibilities and I can't wait to see how it grows!
